extra.reason: Created and strictly validated OpenSpec proposal covering REQ-1 through REQ-44.
Completed all five Rule-of-5 review stages, fixed confirmed findings, reached convergence, and revalidated all 44 requirements.
Completed nine-skill parallel evaluations for RiskTree and compiler-IR specifications, cross-validated findings, and consolidated readiness results.

Resolved all confirmed RiskTree and compiler-IR specification findings; synchronized the authoritative EARS source; strict OpenSpec, traceability, typo, and whitespace checks pass. ah reports only expected no-toml implementation-contract gaps for proposed scenarios.
Documenter now mirrors and recursively navigates the complete OpenSpec tree; all 15 Markdown files render, links are valid, and just doc succeeds.

Generalized the package, docs, EARS source, OpenSpec capabilities, compiler fixtures, and project vocabulary to domain-neutral Tray; isolated finance under FIN-*; strict spec, docs, test, formatting, typo, and traceability checks pass.

ScalarSummary payload + identity laws implemented and tested. 13 test items pass covering: identity construction, identity laws, combine propagation, min/max, higher moments, schema mismatch, non-finite rejection, negative count, reversed extrema, associativity, edge values, identity leaf combination.
